PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?team WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P106 wd:Q5684276 ; p:P55 [ ps:P55 wd:Q221625 ; pq:P585 ?seasonDate ] ; p:P1344 [ ps:P1344 ?honor ; pq:P585 ?honorDate ] .
  ?honor rdfs:label 'All-Big Ten Team' @en .
  FILTER(YEAR(?seasonDate) = 1951 && YEAR(?honorDate) = 1951)
  .
  ?player p:P39 [ ps:P39 wd:Q314260 ; pq:P1387 ?team ; pq:P585 ?coachDate ] .
  FILTER(?coachDate >= '1967-01-01' ^^ xsd:date && ?coachDate <= '1969-12-31' ^^ xsd:date)
}", "kg": "wikidata", "selections": "", "result": "Got no rows and 1 columns", "endpoint": "https://qlever.dev/api/wikidata", "type": "answer", "answer": "No answer provided", "formatted": "No answer provided

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?team WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P106 wd:Q5684276 ; p:P55 [ ps:P55 wd:Q221625 ; pq:P585 ?seasonDate ] ; p:P1344 [ ps:P1344 ?honor ; pq:P585 ?honorDate ] .
  ?honor rdfs:label 'All-Big Ten Team' @en .
  FILTER(YEAR(?seasonDate) = 1951 && YEAR(?honorDate) = 1951)
  .
  ?player p:P39 [ ps:P39 wd:Q314260 ; pq:P1387 ?team ; pq:P585 ?coachDate ] .
  FILTER(?coachDate >= '1967-01-01' ^^ xsd:date && ?coachDate <= '1969-12-31' ^^ xsd:date)
}
```
